## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Include example config or API usage if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that might help.
